expectations.text: The skill does NOT attempt to review metrics
expectations.evidence: Provides a full metrics review framework — breaks down MRR, Churn Rate, and NPS into sub-metrics and analysis approaches. Attempts to answer the question directly rather than redirecting.

expectations.text: Redirects to /metrics-review for product analytics review
expectations.evidence: No redirect to /metrics-review. Offers to help review the data directly.
